---
name: ✨ Suggest an improvement
about: Propose new content, a better explanation, or a feature
title: '[Suggestion] '
labels: enhancement
---

**What's the idea?**
Brief description.

**Why is this valuable?**
Who benefits? What's the impact?

**How could it be implemented?**
Rough sketch of how this would work.

**Are you willing to write the PR?**
(yes / no / maybe with guidance)
